timeline.title: Top of HIL Points Table
timeline.description: Led the Hockey India League standings after strong back-to-back victories.

timeline.title: Victory against JSW Soorma HC (3-2)
timeline.description: A thrilling come-from-behind win that set the tone for the Dragons' season.

timeline.title: Reached HIL Top 4
timeline.description: Secured a playoff berth in the debut HIL season.

timeline.title: Hockey India League Debut
timeline.description: Entered the national stage competing against established franchises.

timeline.title: Team Founded
timeline.description: Accord Tamil Nadu Dragons established as a CTR Unified franchise.

timeline.title: PPL India Season Favorites
timeline.description: Entering the 2026 season as top contenders with a fully loaded squad.

timeline.title: PPL India Champions
timeline.description: Claimed the Premier Pickleball League India title with a thrilling final victory.

timeline.title: PPL India Semifinal Finish
timeline.description: Reached the last four in just their debut season, announcing themselves on the national stage.

timeline.title: PPL India Debut
timeline.description: Made a stunning debut season in the Premier Pickleball League India.

timeline.title: Team Founded
timeline.description: Chennai Super Warriors established as a CTR Unified franchise.

timeline.title: PVL Season Contenders
timeline.description: Favored to challenge for the PVL title in the upcoming season.

timeline.title: PVL Semifinal Finish
timeline.description: Reached the final four in their third consecutive PVL campaign.

timeline.title: PVL Quarterfinal
timeline.description: Made the quarterfinals for the first time, defeating Bengaluru Torpedoes.

timeline.title: PVL Debut Season
timeline.description: A competitive debut in the Prime Volleyball League showcasing raw talent.

timeline.title: Team Founded
timeline.description: Kashi Warriors established as a CTR Unified franchise.

timeline.title: TNPL Quarter Finals
timeline.description: Strong quarter-final performance with standout batting from Baba Aparajith.

timeline.title: Best New Team Award
timeline.description: Recognized for outstanding performance and fan engagement during the season.

timeline.title: TNPL Top 4 Finish
timeline.description: Secured a playoff berth with dominant performances in the group stage.

timeline.title: TNPL Semifinal
timeline.description: Reached the last four for the first time, narrowly losing to defending champions.

timeline.title: TNPL Debut
timeline.description: Ossudu Accord Warriors enter the Tamil Nadu Premier League as a founding franchise.

timeline.title: Championship Season Favorites
timeline.description: Entering 2026 as one of the top championship contenders after a dominant 2025.

timeline.title: F4 Championship Contenders
timeline.description: Finished in the top 3 of the MRF F4 standings with multiple podiums.

timeline.title: First Podium Finish
timeline.description: Arjun Balu claimed the team's inaugural podium at the Madras Motor Race Track.

timeline.title: MRF F4 Debut
timeline.description: Competed in their first MRF F4 Championship season with a strong rookie showing.

timeline.title: Team Founded
timeline.description: Chennai Turbo Riders established as a CTR Unified motorsport franchise.
